team.title: Meet the team behind Leafline
team.desc: Three BUET CSE students building AI-powered crop disease diagnosis for Bangladesh farmers.

steps.title: Sign up with your phone number
steps.desc: Quick OTP-based registration — no complicated forms.

steps.title: Choose the affected plant part
steps.desc: Leaf, root, fruit, flower, or stem/branch.

steps.title: Upload a clear photo
steps.desc: Add your crop type and region for a more accurate result.

steps.title: Get instant AI diagnosis
steps.desc: Disease name, severity, and treatment advice in Bangla.

steps.title: Track your history
steps.desc: Review past diagnoses and see regional trends on the dashboard.

points.title: Bangla-first
points.desc: Every diagnosis, treatment, and prevention tip is written in Bangla.

points.title: Two-model verification
points.desc: A custom-trained disease model is cross-checked against Gemini AI for higher accuracy.

points.title: Weather-aware advice
points.desc: Local district weather is factored into every diagnosis.

points.title: Actionable guidance
points.desc: Not just a diagnosis — concrete treatment and prevention steps.

points.title: Free and accessible
points.desc: Sign up with just a phone number, no cost to use.

footer.tagline: AI-powered crop disease diagnosis for Bangladesh farmers.
